column1: # Goethe-Institut / telc — Deutsch-Test für Zuwanderer (DTZ) alphabetical wordlist (A2–B1)
# Extracted from the official PDF. 2649 entries. Example sentences deliberately EXCLUDED (copyright);
# only factual lemma data is kept (headword, article, plural, Partizip II, auxiliary) + an English gloss.
# Conventions:  N = Nomen (article + plural, reconstructed from the list's umlaut markers)
# STATUS: grammar 100% complete for all 2649. English meanings authored so far: 207/2649 (alphabetical; A done).
#         Empty 'english' = still needs a gloss. 'index' is the stable key — author meanings against it.

column8: to stand out; catch the eye
